title: Requirement
description: A single eligibility requirement extracted from a tender document

requirement_id.description: Unique identifier within a tender (e.g., req_001)

description.description: Human-readable description of the requirement as extracted from the tender

threshold_value.description: Numeric threshold if applicable (e.g., 30 for turnover of 30 Cr)

threshold_period_years.description: Lookback period in years (e.g., 3 for 'average turnover over last 3 years')

is_mandatory.description: Whether this requirement is a mandatory pre-qualification criterion

source_clause.description: Clause number or section reference in the original tender (e.g., '3.2.1', 'Section 4')

raw_text.description: Original text from the tender document that this requirement was extracted from

certification_name.description: For certification requirements: the specific certification required (e.g., 'ISO 9001:2015')

sector.description: For experience requirements: the required sector or domain

source_page.description: Page number in the source PDF where this requirement appears

extraction_confidence.description: Extractor's confidence that this requirement was correctly parsed
